description.name: Eixample Modernista Loft
description.headline: Bright designer loft in the heart of the Eixample
description.description:
A calm base in central Barcelona

This second-floor loft sits on a quiet stretch of the Eixample, a short walk from Passeig de Gràcia. High ceilings and tall windows fill the two bedrooms and open living space with light.

  • Dedicated workspace with fast Wi-Fi
  • Elevator access
  • Air conditioning throughout

Metro, cafes and the Sagrada Família are all within easy reach.

reviews: Great location and very quiet for such a central spot. The workspace was perfect for a few days of remote work.
Lovely light-filled apartment, spotless, and the elevator is a real plus with luggage. Recommended.
Comfortable for the four of us. Close to the metro and plenty of restaurants nearby.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 7 days before check-in.
